response.title: Data-Driven Public Policy Analyst
response.description: As a Data-Driven Public Policy Analyst at InnovateGov Solutions, you will be tasked with leveraging data analytics and visualization techniques to support the development of impactful public policies. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to analyze trends and provide actionable insights that drive policy decisions. This role is ideal for a motivated individual with a passion for data and public service.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Public Policy, Data Science, or related field
